_setup_instructions.module_path: Directory under the project root where components are generated. Common values: src/components, app/_components, src/ui.
_setup_instructions.route_path: Directory where Server Component pages are generated. Common values: app (Next.js App Router), src/routes, app/(routes).
_setup_instructions.hooks_path: Directory for custom hooks. Common values: src/hooks, src/lib/hooks, app/_hooks.
_setup_instructions.reducers_path: Directory for reducer modules. Common values: src/state, src/store, src/reducers.
_setup_instructions.test_runner: Test runner used in generated test files. Supported: vitest (default) or jest. Changes the imports in test templates.
_setup_instructions.import_alias: TypeScript path-alias root for non-relative imports. Common values: @ (for @/lib/db) or src (for src/lib/db). Leave empty to use only relative imports.
